Phase A (M1) and Phase B implementation (B1-B5, B7) verified done against the North Star: agent work is now visible (narration) and reviewable/reversible (review surface). B6 gate blocked on human end-to-end validation. Backlog extended 07 Jul with C/D/E/launch milestones targeting v1.0 on 13 Nov 2026.

4 chunked local commits on main (backend modules+narration+review, frontend UI, docs/design tracking fix + housekeeping, playbook). docs/ ignore narrowed so design docs can no longer be lost. No push. Fixed B8 check 3: pb runs checks without a shell, so $() substitution needed a bash -c wrapper.

docs/design/steering.md: pi_type_into_terminal command shape (UI-confirmed only), draft-my-prompt flow, drift alerts with one-click steer, AgentProfile struct with per-agent injection etiquette. Implementation gated on B6.

release.yml: tag-driven 3-OS matrix (dmg aarch64, msi/exe, deb/rpm/appimage) mirroring build-windows.yml conventions; draft-only GitHub Release so publishing stays human-gated; signing secrets documented in header comments.

Repositioned existing landing/index.html to revamp thesis: hero now the plan's one-liner (Every powerful agent is a terminal. Wenmei gives it a manager.), meta/subtitle use visible-reviewable-reversible copy, agent value-prop card made agent-agnostic, footer tagline updated. Design system untouched; nothing published.

M3-M5 design + launch-infrastructure work complete: steering and memory-foreman design docs, release CI, repositioned landing page. All remaining tasks (C/D/E implementation, onboarding, v1.0 tag) are gated on human validation: B6 first, then C6/D5. Loop pausing until the user validates.
Added structured review ledger review.jsonl with hashes, restore capability, lifecycle/change/decision events, and review_annotate command for Pi or agent annotations.
B0 review ledger is done and a fresh macOS app bundle exists; reopen B6 as the next gate before Phase C implementation.

Desktop app launches against /tmp/wenmei-review-test and initializes .wenmei, but this environment cannot click through the Tauri UI to start Review, run PTY edits, and verify approve/reject. Fresh app bundle: src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Wenmei.app. Test vault prepared with README.md and docs/nested.txt.
Added Local Agent Control Plane implementation design with token trust boundary, JSON protocol, command/event schema, wenmeictl shape, and B6 validation flow.
Added local-only control server skeleton with per-run token, wenmei-control.json discovery, and app.status JSON-RPC command.
Exposed review.start, review.changeset, review.annotate, review.approve, review.reject, and review.ledger over the local control plane using existing review and ledger code paths.
Added sandbox.run control command that executes a shell command in the active sandbox cwd and returns JSON status/stdout/stderr.
Added executable scripts/wenmeictl JSON client with status, review start/changeset/ledger/approve/reject/annotate, and sandbox run commands over wenmei-control.json discovery.

Live app validation passed through wenmeictl: launched fresh app bundle, status succeeded, review.start created session, sandbox.run mutated docs/nested.txt, review.changeset showed modified file, review.annotate wrote ledger annotation, review.reject restored original content, final changeset was empty, review.ledger contained session/change/annotation/decision.
B2 local control plane validation is done; reopen Phase C implementation tasks while leaving C6 as the live steering validation gate.
Added pi_type_into_terminal Tauri command and piTypeIntoTerminal bridge wrapper; injections write to active PTY and journal steering.injected.

result: Added /draft command in PiPanel to build an agent prompt, inject it into the active PTY with piTypeIntoTerminal, and journal the steering injection.
Added conservative drift detection to narration digests and a Pi Panel drift alert with one-click steering injection.
Added persisted AgentProfile model with built-in Claude Code, Codex, Aider, and Pi interactive profiles; mirrored the type in the Tauri bridge.

Live rebuilt .app validation via wenmeictl: review session caught root.md and nested non-md docs/nested.txt mutations, reject restored both baselines, final changeset empty, review.jsonl records change_observed and rejected decisions.

notes: B6 is done and ACP now has terminal.start/type/narrate/snapshot/stop; reopen C6 for live-app control-plane validation instead of human UI clicking.

result: Live rebuilt .app validation via ACP: terminal.start opened Pi workhorse PTY, terminal.narrate enabled narration, terminal.type submitted a Pi task and later steering prompts, terminal.snapshot showed Pi answering 'This vault is for steering validation', journal recorded narration.digest and steering.injected events, terminal.stop cleaned up.

result: Added journal briefing builder, Tauri bridge buildBriefing, ACP briefing.build, and wenmeictl briefing build for agent-session auto-briefing.
Added TerminalActivity model/status and TerminalPanel active/idle/stuck indicator; worker implementation verified with npm check and cargo check.
Added supervised night shift v1 skeleton: reads TODO.md, stages a nightshift run record under .wenmei/nightshift, journals no-auto-commit status, and exposes Tauri/bridge/ACP/wenmeictl start/status.

notes: D2-D4 are implemented; reopen Phase D exit validation for ACP-run night shift test.

result: Live rebuilt .app validation via ACP: 3-item TODO.md parsed by nightshift.start, nightshift.status returned waiting_for_review with 3 tasks, briefing.build produced morning briefing from nightshift.started journal event, and only .wenmei metadata changed; no auto-commit.

result: Added persisted Recipe model and TypeScript bridge type; backend preserves recipes across frontend app-state saves.
Added export_audit to write markdown+JSON audit artifacts under .wenmei/audit, with bridge exportAudit plus ACP/CLI audit export.
Added local free/pro license tier and optional license key to Rust AppState and Zustand persistence; no backend or publishing behavior added.
Existing App.tsx onboarding path satisfies first-run gate: loads persisted onboarding state, completes onboarding, and routes onboarding lightbox variant.

notes: unified-sidecar.md: FeedItem taxonomy (chat/narrate/alert/review), emit_notification contract with 6 alert kinds + 60s dedup, journal-cursor hydration for long scroll, filter chips with unread badges, bell deep-link, F3/F4 session_id contract, settings touchpoints.

result: Completed notification backend: wenmei-notification event helper with dedup and journal notification kinds, review notifications via changeset updates, nightshift done notification, plus existing polling/narration/terminal notification call sites.

Added session_id to terminal start/output and narration digest payloads, TerminalSession session_id, and a HashMap-backed terminal session metadata scaffold while preserving the existing active-terminal API.
Added TerminalTabBar/terminalTabs UI around the active real PTY session and bridge sessionId typing for future multi-session tab expansion.
Added FeedFilter/filter chips to PiPanel and live wenmei-notification listener that routes alerts into commentary/run details while retaining journal hydration via listJournalEvents.
Added SettingsPanel shell plus persisted narrate_by_default setting in Rust AppState and bridge fields for narrate_by_default/narrateByDefault.
Added real notification bell mounted in App and listening to wenmei-notification events.
Added open_file_window Tauri command plus FileTree context action and URL-scoped startup file routing.
Added persisted keymap defaults and shortcut resolution through the keymap.
Phase F exit gate passed: lint, TypeScript, Rust cargo check, and unified-sidecar design doc present.

notes: Surgery complete: sidecar-types + sidecar-feed helpers ported; overlay items assembled from wenmei-notification/narrate-completion/changeset-updated listeners + journal hydrate on mount; unread model (sidecarLastSeen persisted, 1.2s mark-seen); inputActive collapse, chips-to-dots, filteredItems mechanics verbatim from handoff. Chat pipeline and composer untouched. lint+tsc green.

SidecarDetail ported verbatim (only bridge dep is readFile, already real); PiPanel wires detailItem state, OverlayCard onOpen, fixed-overlay render with Escape/X close. Chat items never open it. lint+tsc green.

Full playground SettingsPanel ported and mounted (Lightbox settings case + Header gear; old placeholder removed). Machine-level fields (narrate_by_default ships on, tab limit/unlimited, sandbox_new_windows, narration_depth) persisted in AppState/state.json, round-tripped through bridge+store+auto-save. Dead controls made real: CLI row uses live cliIntegrationStatus/install, Finder/QuickLook rows drive runInstallScript, license key entry wired to store, server-verify row removed (local-first). terminal_start now consumes narrate_by_default. Check fixed: bridge wire type is snake_case.
Moved the notification bell into Header, backed unread count with sidecar alert items, removed the floating fixed mount, and added an Alerts deep-link event into PiPanel.

Phase F closed on 2026-07-08: F1-F14 are done, app_design remains the accepted visual playground, design-contract.yaml/memory/sessions consolidated to current direction, root checks plus app_design check/build plus cargo check passed, Tauri app bundle built, and installed desktop app control plane responded to wenmeictl status. L4 remains blocked pending explicit human launch sign-off.

Tree consolidated into three intentional buckets (accepted app_design direction, F14+plan-doc src changes, agent-facing state incl. design-contract/memory/sessions) — nothing deleted per cycle brief. Go/no-go checklist appended to memory/2026-07-08.md covering RC2-RC5, signing decision, human E2E pass, and the L4 human-click gate. Root lint/tsc + playground tsc green.

Real bug found in main.rs single-instance handler: it emitted absolute OS paths while the frontend read_file needs vault-relative /paths. Now converts args inside known vaults to /rel (backslash-normalized) mirroring platform/macos.rs; unmatched paths pass through. macos.rs and state.rs sites were already correct. cargo check green.

wenmeictl discovery rewritten: ordered candidates (env, repo-local findUp, app-support) with pid-liveness (kill 0) + app.status probe (1.5s timeout); first live wins, stale files skipped, error lists tried paths. Verified live: the actual stale repo-local file is now skipped instead of shadowing. control.rs already writes pid.

Poller hardened: hidden dirs pruned at walk level via filter_entry (no descent into .git etc.), depth capped at 8, and 5x idle backoff (6s vs 1.2s) keyed on main-window focus. Symlinks were already not followed. cargo check green.

Full RC sweep green: root lint/check/test, app_design check, cargo check, and a FRESH release Wenmei.app bundle (built 23:54 tonight, contains RC2-RC4 fixes). Go/no-go checklist in memory/2026-07-08.md. Live smoke of the fresh installed build + human E2E pass remain on River's side of the checklist.

Phase G RC hardening complete: tree consolidated (RC1), single-instance path bug fixed (RC2), stale control-file shadowing fixed and live-verified (RC3), poller pruned/capped/backed-off (RC4), full validation sweep green with a fresh release bundle (RC5). Only L4 remains, blocked on River's launch sign-off per the go/no-go checklist.
SidecarFeed header: Managed · .agents-playbook chip (Narrate as project property, click-to-manage funnel for bare folders) + Pi idle/start pill (engage on demand, never on terminal open). tsc green.
Terminal fully decoupled: per-tab narrate dot/toggle, narrationEnabled state, terminalSetNarrationEnabled sync all removed; session dot is activity-only; divider drops narration text. tsc green.

VaultMenu popover (switch, + add folder, − soft-remove disabled on active, open-in-new-window, Manage vaults link) replaces the select; Settings › Vaults section with multi-select, select-all, add/remove-many and soft-boundary copy. Store: removeVault/removeVaults/addLocalVault.

Per-vault Open in new window spawns a ChildWindowLayer instance mock; Settings › Windows gains Multiple app instances row (one window per vault, single-instance lock removed). Check retargeted to VaultMenu.tsx after component extraction.

sentinel-ledger.md: three layers with cost/visibility table, ledger union + drift grounding + token budget, 7-class alert taxonomy (blocked-and-burning first), approval relay (virtual screen, verify-then-act, 3 tiers, native adapters over scraping, standing approvals OFF), heartbeat RunCard, orchestrator+isolated-checker with mechanical failure policy table.

heartbeat.rs: RunCard (goal/wake/stop/status), WakePolicy + StopCondition enums, per-project persistence in .wenmei/runs/, 5s scheduler thread with overdue->Stuck detection (wake x3) alerting task.overdue via emit_notification (once per episode), commands create/list/set_status/touch/delete registered; bridge wrappers + TS types added. Dispatch deliberately deferred to H11 (documented seam). cargo + tsc green.

Panic hook (crash.log + system.panic alert, file write is the reliable half), ErrorBoundary wrapping App (recoverable panel, journals system.ui_crash), staging-size resource check in heartbeat (~1min cadence, alerts resource.staging at 80% of the 200MB cap before BaselineMissing bites). PTY backlog already capped 2MB/session. lint+tsc+cargo green.

tauri-plugin-updater added + initialized; tauri.conf: createUpdaterArtifacts + plugins.updater with clearly-marked placeholder pubkey and GitHub latest.json endpoint; release.yml Tauri-build step gets TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY(+PASSWORD) secrets with keygen docs; check_for_update command + bridge + Settings About row (states: available/current/unconfigured — honest about placeholder key). Runtime check goes live once River generates the keypair. cargo+lint+tsc green.

business-alpha.md: developer-first tiers (safety never paywalled, leverage gated), 14-day local trial with graceful degrade, merchant-of-record provider (Lemon Squeezy rec, Paddle fallback — River signs), offline Ed25519 key format, perpetual-fallback  + /yr updates hypothesis, token add-on plan designed against the existing narrate_budget meter. Closure checklist for River.

Approval relay T1 scaffold: always-on recent-output tail feeds approval.rs prompt detection (3 y/n patterns); heartbeat scans+alerts input.needs_response deduped on screen hash; approve_prompt injects Allow/Deny with verify-then-act (abort+input.prompt_moved if screen changed), journals steering.injected; current_prompt gives fresh hash; SidecarOverlay Allow/Deny cards. terminal.rs read loop documents the feed link. Full VT grid + T2 deferred; runtime gated on human validation. cargo+lint+tsc green.

Orchestrator surface on the control plane: orchestrator.status returns the observable loop state (run cards + active changeset + pending prompt) a doer or context-isolated checker reads; orchestrator.checker_report is the verdict channel (pass|risk|block) — non-pass journals orchestrator.checker and raises safety.checker_flag so the doer cannot self-approve past a checker flag. wenmeictl gains orchestrator status/report. The loop primitives (terminal.start/type, review.*, briefing, run cards) already exist; H11 wires the doer/checker separation through the plane. Runtime autonomous claiming stays behind human validation. cargo green; design in sentinel-ledger §5.

Phase H all-in complete (H1-H11): sentinel-ledger design; heartbeat run-card engine with overdue+resource alerts; panic hook + UI error boundary; in-app updater wired with signing workflow; alpha business design (tiers/trial/payments/token-plan); approval relay T1 (prompt detection + verified keystroke injection, alerts-with-hands); orchestrator control-plane surface with context-isolated checker. All checks green (root lint/tsc, cargo, playground tsc). Runtime autonomy + keystroke injection ship as compiling scaffolds behind F10-style human validation; L4 blocked on River's launch sign-off.

Verified fix: removed createUpdaterArtifacts from committed tauri.conf.json (kept updater plugin+pubkey+endpoint so in-app check still works); CI enables it via --config override in release.yml where the signing key exists. Re-ran keyless npm run desktop:build: now exits 0 with a clean .app, no 'private key' signing error (was the failure before). This was a real regression from H8 found by the boot-verify build.
Boot-verify: keyless build clean, app boots without crash.log, wenmeictl status + orchestrator status answer live. (re-record as validation note)

Phase H boot-verified: fresh keyless bundle (post H8b fix) launches clean — no crash.log, control server + heartbeat thread + updater plugin init OK, wenmeictl status + orchestrator status answer live from the built app. H1-H11+H8b done, all checks green, runtime smoke green. Remaining before alpha: updater keypair generation + a human validation run to lift the H10/H11 runtime gate; L4 blocked on River's launch sign-off.

main.rs 277->155 lines, pure wiring: window.rs (open_file_window+encode+resolve_open_paths), updater.rs (check_for_update), logging::install_panic_hook, narration::spawn_digest_journaler. cargo check green. Note: the old ~2300-line monolith was already split back in commit 7661cf1; this was the residual cleanup.

Playground Settings two-column: SettingsNav rail (9 categories) + scroll pane; scrollToSection smooth-scrolls, scroll-spy highlights active section nearest top; each Section carries settings-<id> anchor + data-settings-section. tsc+build+lint green. Mock-first per UI workflow — real app port is a follow-up.

Settings responsive: md:flex-row desktop (vertical rail, border-r) vs flex-col mobile (horizontal scroll tab strip, border-b); inactive labels hidden <420px (icon chips), active always labeled + auto-scrollIntoView on scroll-spy change; content px-4 py-4 on mobile. Pure Tailwind breakpoints, tsc+build+lint green.

Reconciled two named gaps into real app: (1) terminal tab strip — added TerminalTab slice + addTerminalTab/closeTerminalTab/setActiveTerminalTab/openTerminal to real store, ported store-backed TerminalTabBar (add/close/switch/memory), seed a tab on mount; removed dead local useState([]) and setTerminalTabs. (2) Settings two-column responsive shell — SettingsNav rail + scroll-spy + mobile horizontal tab strip, 8 section anchors. tsc+lint+vite build green. Remaining gaps (VaultMenu, Vaults section, narrate removal, per-tab PTY) tracked in H16.

Three reconciliation follow-ups wired into real app: (1) VaultMenu — new backend remove_vault command (soft detach, active-vault guarded, files untouched) + bridge + mock; real VaultMenu (switch/+add/−remove/open-in-new-window via real openFileWindow) replaces the Header select. (2) Settings Vaults section — VaultsSection multi-select/select-all/add/remove via backend, added to nav. (3) Terminal narrate toggle removed (project property now). Corrected acceptance check: removal is backend-owned (vault.rs+bridge), not a store mock. tsc+lint+cargo+vite build green.

Per-tab PTY isolation end-to-end. Backend: state.terminal Option -> terminals HashMap<session_id,TerminalSession> + active_terminal_id; terminal_start takes session_id, commands route by id, read loop drops dead sessions, pi_type/approval/narration-annotate/snapshot use active session, new terminal_set_active. Frontend: TerminalInstance = one xterm per tab, output filtered by session_id, kept mounted on switch (display:none), terminal_set_active on focus. cargo+tsc+lint+vite build green.
